popularStory.description: The Spyne family had settled at Coughton by the mid 13th century and, over the years had acquired substantial holdings there, including the manor itself. In 1370 these were settled in reversi …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Guy de la Spine於1360年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親William de la Spine IV37歲，母親Alice de Bruley36歲。他和Lady Katherine Holt至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1427年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Spine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Pasquale, Rocco, Sebastiano, Antonio, Carmine, Carmino, Emidio, Nichola, Nicola, Sando.
Italian: nickname from the Greek adjective spinos ‘thin, spindly’ or the noun spinos ‘linnet’.
Italian: habitational name from any of various places so named, for example Spino d'Adda in Cremona province.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Guy de la Spine was born in 1360, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, William de la Spine IV, was 37 and his mother, Alice de Bruley, was 36. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Lady Katherine Holt. He died in 1427, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Guy de la Spine est né en 1360, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de la Spine IV, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bruley, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Lady Katherine Holt. Il est décédé en 1427, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Guy de la Spine 1360 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de la Spine IV 37 und seine Mutter Alice de Bruley 36. Er hatte mit Lady Katherine Holt mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1427 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy de la Spine è nato il nel 1360 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William de la Spine IV, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Bruley, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Lady Katherine Holt. Morì nel 1427, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Guy de la Spineが1360年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父William de la Spine IVは37歳，母Alice de Bruleyは36歳であった。彼はLady Katherine Holtとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1427年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Guy de la Spine(이)가 1360년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de la Spine IV(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Bruley(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Lady Katherine Holt(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Guy de la Spine nasceu em 1360, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de la Spine IV, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Bruley, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Lady Katherine Holt. Ele faleceu em 1427, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Guy de la Spine родился в 1360 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de la Spine IV было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bruley, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Lady Katherine Holt. Он умер в 1427 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Guy de la Spine nació en 1360, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de la Spine IV, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Alice de Bruley, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Lady Katherine Holt. Murió en 1427, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
